name: Pumpkin Drops (Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup butter, softened to room temperature
1 cup canned or cooked fresh pumpkin puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, beat together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well.
4. Stir in pumpkin puree.
5. Gradually add flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and pumpkin-pie spice, stirring just until blended.
6. Fold in chocolate chips and chopped walnuts or pecans.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
9. Transfer cookies to a wire rack; cool on the rack. Yield: 6 to 7 dozen 1-1/4 inch cookies.
